FU-1_convex_savedRoutes_curated_rows.description: Extended getSavedRoutesList + getSavedRouteDetail in convex/db/savedRoutes.ts to return curated rows (curatedRouteRef + lean preview fields). Updated shared/types/routes.ts SavedRouteListItemView and SavedRouteDetailView types.

FU-2_convex_getCuratedRouteDetail__id.description: Added _id: v.id('curated_routes') to getCuratedRouteDetail return type and buildRouteDetail. Updated frontend curated-route/[id].tsx to use detail?._id instead of detail?.routeId.

FU-3_maestro__common_launch_to_plan.description: Created .maestro/_common-launch-to-plan.yaml helper (mirrors rux-007 pattern). Also created .maestro/_common-auth.yaml standalone auth helper.

FU-5_simulator_convex_env.description: iPhone 17 booted (UDID 81487B1E-A4D1-45AE-9BCE-D675802BACD1). Convex dev deployment live. E2E creds in .env.local.

maestro_yaml_parsing.description: Replaced runScript/commands YAML blocks with openLink in all 5 deep-link flows (uc-dtl-03-*, uc-dtl-04-*, curated-route-detail.yaml). runScript nested commands caused Config Field Required: file parsing errors.

maestro_env_vars.description: Hardcoded appId (com.hackerpug.laneshadow) and APP_SCHEME (laneshadow) — ${VAR} interpolation unreliable in Maestro 2.5.1.

maestro_auth_helpers.description: Created _common-auth.yaml and _common-launch-to-plan.yaml helpers with DEVELOPERS SERVERS dev-client handling. Caveat: app cold-start takes 5+ minutes; the 'DEVELOPMENT SERVERS' screen is sometimes bypassed by the Expo deep-link tolocalhost:8081.

e2e_test_data.description: Created 3 test curated routes via seedGeospatialTest:seedE2ETestRoutes mutation: wasatch-ridge-traverse (with polyline), blue-ridge-overlook (no polyline), cherohala-skyway (with polyline).

maestro_scroll_fix.description: Added swipe(direction: UP) before asserting on action buttons and approximate badge, because the score-bar section occupies significant scroll space and pushes actions below the fold.

typecheck.description: Convex type-check passes clean. 2 pre-existing Expo Router type errors unrelated to sprint changes.

flow_results.evidence: All 6 assertions pass against booted iPhone 17 simulator + live Convex dev: name renders, map section present, polyline probe visible, approximate-badge NOT visible, 'Approximate location' text NOT visible.
flow_results.details: Covers DESIGN-003 AC-1 + AC-5 (WITH polyline → render + no badge). This is the ONLY flow that ran end-to-end successfully.

flow_results.evidence: Name + map assertions pass when app loads. approximate-badge assertion never reached — app cold-start takes 5+ minutes; the flow times out during _common-auth.yaml before reaching the detail screen.
flow_results.block_reason: Simulator cold-start: app takes >300s to show first screen after clearState+clearKeychain. Subsequent launches warm but each Maestro flow clears state.

flow_results.evidence: Name assertion passes when app loads. Save button never reached — same cold-start timeout as above.
flow_results.block_reason: Same simulator cold-start issue. Scroll fix applied (swipe UP added before save assertion) but unverified due to timeout.

flow_results.evidence: Name assertion passes when app loads. Ride It button never reached — same cold-start timeout.
Complex multi-scenario flow (AC-1 card tap + AC-2 no-polyline deep-link + AC-3 pin tap). Requires _common-launch-to-plan.yaml which also times out on cold-start.
flow_results.block_reason: Multi-scenario flow with multiple launchApp calls — each triggers cold-start delay.

flow_results.evidence: Integration flow spanning save→list→reopen→unsave across multiple screens. Requires pre-existing auth + save state.
flow_results.block_reason: Flow is NOT standalone — depends on a prior save action from uc-dtl-04-save. Designed as a journey-level test that validates the full save/reopen/unsave cycle. Also blocked by cold-start.

human_testing_steps_coverage.notes: Logic verified in jsdom; live E2E blocked by app cold-start.
Weather conditions failure path verified via integration tests.
Scroll placement verified via integration tests.
Save logic verified in jsdom; scroll fix applied but unverified on-device.
Saved list + reopen verified via jsdom. Live E2E requires FU-1 read-path change + save-curated.yaml flow.
Ride It deeplink args verified via jsdom; live E2E blocked by cold-start.
Web fallback verified via jsdom test for SAVE-002 AC-3.

blocker_analysis.details: After clearState:true + clearKeychain:true, the Expo dev-client + JS bundle takes >300 seconds to render the first screen (DEVELOPMENT SERVERS or Login). Subsequent warm launches are fast but each Maestro flow clears state. This makes batch E2E verification (6 flows × 5 min = 30+ min) impractical in a single session.
blocker_analysis.mitigation: Run flows sequentially with a long per-flow timeout (≥10 min each) in a dedicated CI session, OR remove clearKeychain:true and prime auth once then run all flows reusing auth state (requires flows to NOT clear keychain).
secondary_issues: Action buttons scroll off screen below the score-bars section — scroll fix applied but unverified on-device
save-curated.yaml is a multi-screen journey flow, not a standalone verification — requires a parent flow to prime the save state first
